name: Winter House
overview: Embark on the ultimate winter getaway with some of Bravo’s beloved Summer House and Southern Charm cast members and their friends during a two-week vacation in Stowe, Vermont. Reach new peaks when this rowdy crew kicks off an epic experience filled with hot tub hookups and snowy shenanigans.

trailers.title: Your First Look at Winter House! New Series Premieres October 20th | Bravo
